author: y4rr
content:
Followup move complete:
- Memory file: moved feedback_no_scaffolds.md from .claude/projects/-home-doll-ferrotorch/memory/ to .claude/projects/-home-doll-ferrotorch-paged/memory/, created paged-specific MEMORY.md index there, pruned the dead link from the ferrotorch MEMORY.md
- .gitignore: removed dead entries for ferrotorch-paged/ and ferrotorch-paged-design.md
- Public-crate doc strings: removed dangling references in ferrotorch-llama/src/gpu.rs (ForwardTaps doc), ferrotorch-llama/examples/llama3_8b.rs (header note), ferrotorch-gpu/src/bf16.rs (gpu_block_reduce_max_abs_bf16 doc) — replaced with neutral descriptions of intent
- .claude/settings.local.json: removed dead Bash permission targeting ferrotorch-paged/src/predictor/mod.rs
Left as-is on purpose: CHANGELOG.md historical entries (truthful project history) and one passing reference in llama3_stack.md memory (rationale for multi-batch deferral, not paged-specific). Both workspaces (ferrotorch and ferrotorch-paged) cargo check clean.
